content.title: Muslims Day Ansar Update!
content.subtitle: Alhamdulillah, 261 Ansar members have already joined us!
content.body:
Ansar Update

Today is Friday, the day of Jumu'ah—a blessed time for acceptance of prayers (Dua) and gathering provisions for the Hereafter. Two weeks back like this Friday, we shared an update regarding the Ansar program with you. Alhamdulillah! In this very small duration we have received an incredible response from you. Currently, our total number of Ansar members has reached 261. May Allah Ta'ala accept everyone's sincere intentions. Jazakumullahu Khairan.

🎯 What is the Mission of Muslims Day?

The goal of Muslims Day is not just to run an app. Our dream is to build a platform that helps millions of Muslims draw closer to Allah every single day—by assisting them in reading the Qur'an, staying mindful of their prayers, learning Duas, and guiding their families on the path of Islam.

InshaAllah, within the next 6 months, we aim to scale Muslims Day app installations to 10 million (1 Crore), so that more people can access authentic Islamic knowledge, practice good deeds, and seek spiritual purification.

🤝 Who are Muslims Day Ansars?

Running this massive mission requires consistent financial support. Therefore, out of millions of users, we are looking for just 2000 Ansar members—who will contribute only 500 BDT every month to sustain this continuous charity (Sadaqah Jariyah). They are not just premium subscribers; they are the core companions of this Dawah mission.

📊 Our Next Goal

To complete this caravan of 2000 Ansars, we still need 1739 more companions. Your participation in this journey of delivering beneficial Islamic knowledge to 10 million Muslims is deeply important. Perhaps Allah Ta'ala will make you the means to spread the light of Deen to countless others.

💎 What are the Benefits of Becoming an Ansar?

✅ The opportunity to share in the rewards of millions of people's good deeds (Sadaqah Jariyah).

✅ 7 Premium Subscriptions for Muslims Day.

✅ 1 Premium Subscription for the Mahfil App.

✅ FREE access to special online Halaqas, seminars, and exclusive events.

Yet, the greatest reward of all is becoming an active part of an ongoing service to Islam.

🌙 A Decision on this Blessed Day of Jumu'ah

Perhaps 500 BDT a month is not a huge amount for you—it might just be the cost of eating out at a restaurant once! However, this small contribution can become a powerful Sadaqah Jariyah, the rewards of which will continue to flow even after your death, InshaAllah.

On this blessed day of Jumu'ah, join us as Muslims Day Ansar. InshaAllah, this could be one of the most beautiful investments you make for your Hereafter.

I also want to become a Muslims Day Ansar! 👉 Click 👉 https://id.kahf.co/ansar/muslimsday
